---
name: Formula change
about: Suggest a change to a simulation formula
title: "[Formula]: "
labels: formula
---

## Formula affected

Which formula or model is affected? (e.g., energy model, productivity model, burnout model, pricing model)

## Current behavior

Describe the current formula and its output.

## Proposed behavior

Describe the proposed formula change and its expected output.

## Reasoning

Explain why this change is needed. Include references to research, data, or real-world observations if available.

## Expected impact

How would this change affect simulation results? Would it change energy levels, output, burnout accumulation, pricing, or other metrics?

## Sources or references, if any

Link to any papers, articles, data sources, or discussions that support this change.

## Tests that should be updated

List the test files and test cases that would need to be updated to reflect the formula change.

> **Note:** Formula changes must not be placed in API route handlers or frontend components. The simulation engine must remain isolated.
